HGSS.701.0001:
Mostly I breathe fire, but want
to exchange phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.701.0002:
All right!\f
Don’t worry. I’ll stop breathing fire
while we’re talking on the phone...\r
so give me a call sometime!
HGSS.701.0003:
I knew that us Firebreathers weren’t
particularly well liked...
HGSS.701.0004:
Oh!
Would you like to breathe fire with me?\f
...Oh, you don’t.\f
Would you like to exchange phone
numbers with me after all? [0200,0000]
HGSS.701.0005:
It’s all right.
I promise I won’t burn you, so you can\r
come talk to me in person.
HGSS.701.0006:
You know, a lot of people
misunderstand.\f
It may seem like we Firebreathers use
fire to threaten our Pokémon while\r
training them.\f
But that’s not the case at all!
We just train our Pokémon normally!\r
Isn’t that right, [0100,000A,0000]?\f
Breathing fire is just a hobby!
HGSS.701.0007:
Buoahhhbobobo!\f
What do you think?
I discovered a new technique\r
for breathing fire!\f
Well, not like you can tell over
the phone...\f
Never mind that. I caught a wild
[0100,000B,0000] yesterday.\f
I think I’ll start training it soon.
HGSS.701.0008:
Do you like [0100,000B,0000]?\f
As for me...they’re all right. There’s
all kinds of things in this world.
HGSS.701.0009:
Buoahhhbobobo!
Today is a great day!\f
You should have another battle with me!
I’m waiting and practicing on\r
[0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.701.0010:
I’m all ready, and waiting for you on
[0104,0003,0000], so hurry up!
HGSS.701.0011:
You know how there are so many
different types of Pokémon, right?\f
Each type has good points and bad
points, so it’s not easy to say which\r
type is the best.\f
However...\f
My choice has to be the Fire type!\r
Buoahhhbobobo!!
HGSS.701.0012:
Did you know that today’s the
Bug-Catching Competition?\f
I’m not that into Bug-type Pokémon,
but the National Park isn’t that far\r
from Route 35...\r
I thought I might go check it out.
